title: Terms and Conditions - Hospeda
description: Read our terms and conditions of use to understand your rights and responsibilities when using Hospeda.
heading: Terms and Conditions

acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.body: By accessing and using this platform, you agree to be bound by these terms and conditions of use. If you disagree with any of these terms, we ask that you do not use our services. This agreement constitutes a binding contract between you and Hospeda.
acceptance.content: By accessing and using the Hospeda website, you agree to be bound by these terms and conditions of use. If you disagree with any part of these terms, you must not use our service.

serviceDescription.title: 2. Description of Service
serviceDescription.content: Hospeda is an online platform that connects guests with hosts offering short-term accommodations. We facilitate bookings but do not own or operate the accommodations listed on our platform.

accountRegistration.title: 3. Account Registration
accountRegistration.body: To access certain features, you will need to create an account. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your credentials and all activities performed under your account. You must notify us immediately of any unauthorized use.
accountRegistration.intro: To use certain services, you must create an account by providing accurate and complete information. You are responsible for:

responsibilities.activities: All activity that occurs under your account

bookingsPayments.title: 4. Bookings and Payments
bookingsPayments.intro: When making a booking through our platform:

conditions.fees: You agree to pay all applicable fees
conditions.cancellation: You are subject to the host's cancellation policies
conditions.rules: You must comply with the accommodation's house rules
conditions.payments: Payments are processed securely through our payment providers

userResponsibilities.title: 5. User Responsibilities
userResponsibilities.body: You agree to use our services in a responsible and legal manner. Using the platform for illegal, fraudulent, or rights-infringing activities is prohibited. We reserve the right to suspend or cancel accounts that violate these rules.

commitments.legal: Use the service in a lawful and appropriate manner
commitments.rights: Not infringe on the rights of other users
commitments.content: Not post offensive or illegal content

cancellationPolicies.title: 6. Cancellation Policies
cancellationPolicies.content: Cancellation policies vary by host and are clearly displayed during the booking process. Hospeda may charge non-refundable service fees as specified at the time of booking.

liabilityLimitation.title: 7. Limitation of Liability
liabilityLimitation.content: Hospeda acts as an intermediary between guests and hosts. We are not responsible for the quality, safety, or legality of listed accommodations, the accuracy of descriptions, or the ability of users to complete transactions.

intellectualProperty.title: 8. Intellectual Property
intellectualProperty.content: All content on the Hospeda platform, including text, graphics, logos, icons, images, and software, is the property of Hospeda or its licensors and is protected by copyright law.

termsModifications.title: 9. Modifications to Terms
termsModifications.content: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Changes take effect immediately upon publication on the website. Continued use of the service constitutes acceptance of the modified terms.

termination.title: 10. Termination
termination.content: We may suspend or terminate your account if you violate these terms or for any other reason, at our sole discretion, with or without prior notice.

applicableLaw.title: 11. Governing Law
applicableLaw.content: These terms are governed by the laws of the country where Hospeda has its principal place of business, without regard to conflict of law principles.

usage.title: 2. Service Usage
usage.body: You agree to use our services in a responsible and legal manner. Using the platform for illegal, fraudulent, or rights-infringing activities is prohibited. We reserve the right to suspend or cancel accounts that violate these rules.

accounts.title: 3. User Accounts
accounts.body: To access certain features, you will need to create an account. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your credentials and all activities performed under your account. You must notify us immediately of any unauthorized use.

content.title: 4. Content
content.body: Users are responsible for the content they publish on the platform. By publishing content, you grant Hospeda a non-exclusive license to use, reproduce, and distribute such content. We reserve the right to remove content we deem inappropriate.

liability.title: 5. Liability
liability.body: Hospeda acts as an intermediary between accommodation providers and users. We are not responsible for the quality, safety, or legality of services offered by third parties. Use of the platform is at your own risk.

modifications.title: 6. Modifications
modifications.body: We reserve the right to modify these terms and conditions at any time. Changes will take effect immediately upon publication on the platform. It is your responsibility to periodically review these terms.

contact.title: 12. Contact
contact.body: If you have questions or concerns about these terms and conditions, you can contact us through the communication channels available on our platform. We will do our best to respond to your inquiries promptly.
contact.intro: If you have questions about these terms and conditions, you can reach us at:

page.title: Terms and Conditions
page.description: Terms and conditions of use for the Hospeda platform
